text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home from an outing with Narita
Brian...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Nothing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Mmm... nothing here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. No problem. Don't worry about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian stays fidgety all the way back to the
academy. I probably ought to ask a little more
seriously.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, fine.
choice_data_list: If something happened, please tell me.
If something happened, please tell me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch... You don't quit, do you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I lost my wallet. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
There was nothing important in it, just some small
change, so it doesn't matter.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What's with you all of sudden?
choice_data_list: I don't want you to make a habit of giving up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch. How very thoughtful of you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm not giving up. I'm going to look for it later.
choice_data_list: It'll be easier if we both look for it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Siiiigh... This is exactly why I didn't want you to find out.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I lost it. I'll find it. You just go home.
choice_data_list: Don't worry, I'm sure we'll find it in no time!

When you're in trouble, you should ask for help.
Let's ask someone.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Where does all that optimism come from?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Eh, whatever. I'm guessing you have some kind of
plan, since you're so optimistic. So, where should
we start looking?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's way too inefficient...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But I guess we'll never find it if we don't go back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Fine. We'll go as far as we have to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We retrace our steps until we arrive back at the
station.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Oh. That's right! I took out my wallet when I
bought my ticket...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hold on a sec...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It was in the lost and found. Looks like I left it
next to the ticket machine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah... So...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks for the help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her wallet now safe and sound, Narita Brian
and I head back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Who on earth are we gonna to ask? You want to
go around asking people on the street?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No way. That's a terrible idea. Are you an idiot or
something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't it be better to ask at the police box or
in the nearby stores?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: H-hey, wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Brian decides to go back to the station to ask
about her wallet.

text_block_list.name: Station Staff
text_block_list.text:
Oh yes, we've got it here. It looks like it was
found near the ticket machine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Narita Brian's lost wallet is returned to
her safe and sound.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Still, I'm surprised we found it.
choice_data_list: It's because you didn't give up.
It's because you didn't give up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch! Don't get carried away. This is just thanks to
some stranger who picked it up for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Well, that was one of the reasons I was able to
find it, anyway...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Enough of that, it's getting late. Let's hurry back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her wallet found, Narita Brian and I head
back to the academy.
